description_long: This is a white four-door sedan police car with a streamlined body and a prominent blue emergency light bar mounted on the roof. The vehicle features tinted windows, alloy wheels, and a rear spoiler, giving it a modern and functional appearance. The car has two thin antennae on the roof, likely for communication equipment. The front and rear bumpers are robust, and the headlights and taillights are clearly defined. The side mirrors are compact and integrated into the doors, while the door handles are flush with the body. There are no visible police markings, insignia, or department identifiers on the exterior.
description: A white four-door police sedan with a blue roof light bar, tinted windows, and alloy wheels. The car has a modern, streamlined design with no visible police markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille, headlights, and blue roof light bar, with a clear windshield and no visible markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, alloy wheels, blue roof light bar, and two roof antennae.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the taillights, rear bumper, trunk, and blue roof light bar, with no visible license plate details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four doors, alloy wheels, blue roof light bar, and antennae.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single blue rectangular light bar is mounted centrally on the roof. No other emergency lights are visible on the grille or rear.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate area is present on both the front and rear bumpers, but no visible text, numbers, or special markings can be seen.
